calendar.matters:
MOTION (Notice Of Rescheduled Hearing)To Determine Whether Records Should Be Sealed
Off Calendar Dec-13-2001 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Paul Alexander, Esq. & Michael M. Markman, Esq. of HellerEhrman 650/324-7000, & James Edward Maloney, Esq. of Baker Botts LLP 713/229-1255 for pltf & moving party; Eliot S. Jubelirer, Esq. & Wendi J. Berkowitz, Esq. of Morgenstein & Jubelirer LLP 901-8700, & Joseph S. Cohen, Esq. & William C. Norvell, Jr., Esq. of Beirne, Maynard & Parsons, LLP 713/623-0887 for deft & opposing party.
RULING: Argued and the Court granted the motion to seal as to the patent numbers and sentence in award, and licensing agreement. Court grants motion to confirm arbitration award, denies Mr. Jubelirer's oral request to modify award. Motion to stay/dismiss denied. Pltf to prepare order.
